name: Amir Sepahi
title: Ph.D. Candidate in Electrical and Computer Engineering
tagline: Designing intelligent, adaptive, and resilient communication networks with AI/ML.
bioShort: Amir Sepahi (Graduate Student Member, IEEE) received the M.Sc. degree in communication networks from Isfahan University of Technology in 2019. He is currently pursuing the Ph.D. degree with the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering, University of Victoria, BC, Canada, under the supervision of Dr. Lin Cai. His research interests include wireless communications, internet protocols, artificial intelligence, and network security. He also brings hands-on industry experience in AI backend development from Ericsson's Global AI Accelerator (GAIA), where he built GenAI and predictive modeling systems (RAG-based enterprise search, intent-based network automation, and real-time telemetry forecasting) for 5G/6G networks.
